source_intake_record.raw_question_text: An infinitely long uniform solid wire of radius \( a \) carries a uniform DC current of density \( \vec{J} \). A hole of radius \( b \) (where \( b < a \)) is now drilled along the length of the wire at a distance \( d \) from the center of the wire as shown below. The magnetic field inside the hole is
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: Uniform and depends only on \( d \)

choice_map.A: Uniform and depends only on \( d \)
choice_map.B: Uniform and depends only on \( b \)
choice_map.C: Uniform and depends on both \( b \) and \( d \)

extraction_notes: choices were embedded inside the problem field
solution was a choice letter and was mapped to the corresponding option text
image field contains a PIL image object representation, not a path or URL

image_dependency: 题干含有“as shown below”，并涉及孔与导线中心的空间偏置关系
multi_step: 该题不是直接读图，需结合电流分布、偏心圆孔几何与磁场结论进行推理
答案为关于场是否均匀以及依赖参数的判断，通常需至少两步以上物理推导/比较
提供4个选项，正确项需要区分“均匀/非均匀”以及“依赖d/b/两者”
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，且答案与选项A可直接对应
choices中给出了封闭候选集，便于规则化核验
答案表述明确：'Uniform and depends only on d'
